category_sources: Official GitHub README says gateway-go runs on LAN to receive remote access requests for OpenIoTHub.
source_facts.description says it is the GateWay Client for OpenIoTHub.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is gateway-go.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary usage and install documentation.
Official GitHub README links to docs.iothub.cloud for Chinese documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/OpenIoTHub/gateway-go; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes remote access, LAN gateway operation, QR-code client pairing, OpenWrt, Docker, and binary installs.
Official GitHub topics include tunnel, golang, client, iot, openwrt, nat, gateway, socks, and openiothub.
